title: Solar cell systems and methods of making the same
abstract: A solar cell system and a flexible solar panel are disclosed herein. The solar cell system includes a glass housing, a set of rows of solar cells each defining a front side and a rear side and arranged within the glass housing. The solar cell system can also include a reflective element disposed in the glass housing and facing the rear side of the set of rows of solar cells and a first terminal coupled to a first end of the set of rows of solar cells, traversing through and sealed against the first end of the glass housing. The solar cell system can be configured with other solar cell systems into the flexible solar panel that is deployable in a wide range of potential applications.
claims: 1. A solar panel system comprising: a set of solar cell modules each comprising: a glass housing defining a first end and a second end opposite the first end: a set of bifacial solar cells: defining a front side configured to face upward and a rear side, opposite the front side configured to face downward; and arranged within the glass housing; a first cap: arranged on and sealing the first end of the glass housing; defining a first cable interface; and defining a first electrical interface offset from the first cable interface; a second cap: arranged on and sealing the second end of the glass housing; and defining a second cable interface; and an electrical harness: configured to electrically couple to first cable interfaces of the set of solar cell modules; a first cable connected to first caps of the set of solar cell modules via first cable interfaces; and a second cable: connected to second caps of the set of solar cell modules via second cable interfaces; and cooperating with the first cable to locate the set of solar cells.
